nodes.name: Conception
nodes.description: The agent's current working hypothesis for a turn: bundles the world model, the goal, and the plan.
nodes.remark: Stereotype 'answer'. Lifecycle via status: active -> committed -> retired; score ranks competing conceptions.

nodes.name: WorldModel
nodes.description: Models the game's dynamics: a set of interaction rules plus the state-abstraction function.
nodes.remark: impl may be Symbolic, Learned, or Graph; predict() drives look-ahead during planning.

nodes.name: GoalPredicate
nodes.description: Expresses a win or sub-goal condition as a composable predicate over objects and relations.
nodes.remark: Composable via kind (Atom/AND/OR/SEQUENCE); children are ordered only for SEQUENCE.

nodes.name: GamePlan
nodes.description: An ordered sequence of steps toward the goal, bounded by a planning horizon.
nodes.remark: Re-planned when the world model or goal changes.

nodes.name: Step
nodes.description: One planned move plus its expected resulting state and the sub-goal it serves.
nodes.remark: Value object: a step is compared by content, not identity.

nodes.name: PiStateAbstraction
nodes.description: The abstraction function (pi) that projects a raw Frame into an abstract MarkovState.
nodes.remark: Selects only salient objects/features/relations, discarding pixel-level detail.

nodes.name: InteractionRule
nodes.description: A learned rule mapping a triggering configuration and move to the resulting state change.
nodes.remark: confidence weights the rule during prediction; refined from TurnRecords.

nodes.name: MarkovState
nodes.description: An abstracted, hashable game state: salient objects keyed by role plus the relations that hold.
nodes.remark: Hashability lets the planner memoise look-ahead over states.

nodes.name: GoalPatterns
nodes.description: Prior templates over object roles and relations, instantiated into concrete GoalPredicates.
nodes.remark: A baked-in prior: not learned per game, it seeds goal hypotheses.

nodes.name: TurnRecord
nodes.description: Record of one played turn: the move that was issued and the frames observed in response.
nodes.remark: The raw evidence the world model and rules learn from.

nodes.name: Probe
nodes.description: A trial set of moves issued specifically to learn the environment's response.
nodes.remark: Exploration device; its expected_observation is compared against what actually happened.

nodes.name: GameMove
nodes.description: A single intended game action with its kind and optional parameters (e.g. coordinates).
nodes.remark: Internal representation; translated to a raw Action at the API boundary.

nodes.name: Action
nodes.description: The raw ARC action at the external API boundary (an enum, or an x,y coordinate).
nodes.remark: Boundary type. GameIO translates a GameMove into this external encoding.

nodes.name: GameObject
nodes.description: A game-world object: its cells, optional sub-part composition, and its feature profile.

nodes.name: Profile
nodes.description: A per-object feature profile: a map from dimension id to a (value, confidence) pair.
nodes.remark: render() turns the profile into a human-readable name via the Lexicon.

nodes.name: Lexicon
nodes.description: The vocabulary of dimensions and relations, split into a base (long-term) and an overlay (working memory).
nodes.remark: extend() adds game-specific features to the overlay without touching the base.

nodes.name: Dimension
nodes.description: A unary feature: a detector mapping a single object to a value over a domain.

nodes.name: Relation
nodes.description: An n-ary feature: a detector over several objects yielding a value or boolean.
nodes.remark: arity n generalises Dimension (the unary case).

edges.label: world
edges.description: The conception owns the world model it reasons with.

edges.label: goal
edges.description: The conception owns the goal it is trying to satisfy.

edges.label: plan
edges.description: The conception owns the plan it intends to execute.

edges.label: rules  1..*
edges.description: The world model is composed of its learned interaction rules.

edges.label: abstraction  1
edges.description: The world model owns the abstraction function it uses to form states.

edges.label: ordered steps  1..*
edges.description: A plan is composed of an ordered list of steps.

edges.label: has  1
edges.description: Each game object owns exactly one feature profile.

edges.label: defines (unary)  *
edges.description: The lexicon defines the available unary dimensions.

edges.label: defines (n-ary)  *
edges.description: The lexicon defines the available n-ary relations.

edges.label: trial moves (to LEARN)  1..*
edges.description: A probe aggregates the trial moves it issues to learn.

edges.label: aims at
edges.description: The plan is directed at satisfying the goal predicate.

edges.label: move
edges.description: A step references the concrete move it will play.

edges.label: records played
edges.description: A turn record references the move that was actually played.

edges.label: value per Dimension
edges.description: A profile holds one value per dimension it is measured on.

edges.label: over (n) objects
edges.description: A relation is evaluated over the game objects it relates.

edges.label: instantiated into (bind roles to objects)
edges.description: Goal patterns are instantiated into concrete goal predicates by binding roles to objects.

edges.label: expect (predicted)
edges.description: A step depends on the predicted Markov state it expects to reach.

edges.label: external encoding; GameIO translates
edges.description: An action is the external encoding a game move is translated into.

edges.label: maps Frame to MarkovState
edges.description: The abstraction depends on MarkovState as the type it produces.

edges.label: (MarkovState, GameMove) to next
edges.description: An interaction rule maps a state and move to the next state.

edges.label: triggers on / sets relations
edges.description: Rules trigger on, and assert, relations between objects.

edges.label: tests (win?)
edges.description: A goal predicate is tested against a Markov state to decide a win.

edges.label: conditions over objects
edges.description: Goal conditions are quantified over game objects.

edges.label: tests relations
edges.description: Goal conditions test relations among objects.

edges.label: models object dynamics
edges.description: The world model depends on game objects whose dynamics it models.

edges.label: abstracts salient objects
edges.description: The abstraction selects and abstracts the salient game objects.
